apps.purpose: Provide quick Information Center reference support for Monterey Bay Aquarium volunteers.
apps.shortDescription: Information Center handbook with search, dropdown sections, quick references, cache refresh, and troubleshooting.
apps.testingStatus: Needs PC Chrome, iPhone Safari, and offline confirmation after Hub 2 upload.
apps.notes: First installed app in Hub 2. Return to Hub path should resolve to ../../index.html.

apps.purpose: Help Monterey Bay Aquarium volunteers use multisensory interpretation to make exhibits accessible, engaging, and memorable.
apps.shortDescription: MBA interpretation skills guide for using touch, hearing, smell, and taste comparisons with guests.
apps.testingStatus: Independent app opens correctly. Needs Hub display confirmation, PC Chrome, iPhone Safari, and offline testing.
apps.notes: Preservation rebuild from original five-senses.html. App folder should be apps/five-senses-pwa/.
